title: HOOK 3 — Sara unwraps
prompt: Medium close-up in @dream-house. @Sara grabs the giant sparkly bow and pulls it free with both hands, ribbon flying. The wrapping flutters off. Sara (giggling): "Wheeeee!" Then her eyes go huge. Sara (slowly, in awe): "It's… a DREAM HOUSE!" Confetti effect, bright morning light.
